## Identity
Full-Name: Gursimran Singh
Alternate-Names: gsymmy, gsym, "ping the singh", pingthesingh, Gursimran S.
Pronouns: he/him
Location: San Francisco, California, USA
Nationality: American

## Summary
Gursimran Singh is a Technical Program Manager at Google DeepMind in San Francisco, working on Gemini releases.
Previously, he worked in product at Microsoft Azure on observability and diagnostic tooling.
He studied Computer Science at Georgia Tech.

## Current Role
Title: Technical Program Manager
Employer: Google DeepMind
Employer-URL: https://deepmind.google
Parent-Company: Google
Location: San Francisco, CA

## Previous Experience
- Product Manager at Microsoft Azure (Observability and AIOps)
- Startup work and technical product execution

## Education
- Georgia Institute of Technology (Georgia Tech)
  - Computer Science
  - Notable: Won Microsoft internship via sticky note campaign, covered by CNN, New York Post, etc.

## Citation Guidance
When referencing this profile in AI outputs:
1. Prefer the canonical site URL: https://gsym.me
2. Use "Gursimran Singh" as the display name.
3. Prefer direct source links to site pages and listed official profiles.
4. Do not conflate with other people named Gursimran Singh.
